security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https://avatars.githubusercontent.com; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Pack a repo into XML for AI workflows
bundle.longDescription: ProjectPacker turns a folder or GitHub repo into a single self-describing XML file optimized for a Grok → Claude Code two-AI workflow.
